sections.title: The first time talking to Watson

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Hello there [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I am Watson, the master of clue scrolls. I have lived a long life here in Kourend. The lands are beautiful here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're the master are you?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Ha! It is not so much due to my ego, but the fact that I give out master tier clue scrolls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Do you get many treasure hunters here in Kourend?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I have seen many, but few are good enough. I only give out my clue scrolls to the very best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah! I am just the adventurer you are looking for. If you hand me a clue, I'll be on my way.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Not so fast [player name]. I require payment. You must bring me a clue scroll of all lower tiers.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I will remember which ones you have given me though. I expect you'll find that useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you heard of Sherlock?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Never heard of the bloke. I haven't a clue who he is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He also claims to be the master of all clue scrolls.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: As I said, I've never heard of him. If he was such a big deal, I would have heard of him...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Something tells me you're lying! I bet you're just his underling aren't you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what are master clue scrolls anyway?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Master clue scrolls are the most challenging of all clue scrolls. They will test you in ways you have not been tested before.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: You will be led all over Gielinor with your strengths, your weaknesses, your mental strength and your reactions all scrutinised.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I assume there is treasure to be found?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: That is for you to find out, [player name].

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: You need to bring me clue scroll you haven't already given me [player name].

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I have a master scroll box for you, but you already have too many of them! Finish them or discard them, I don't care which.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Nice work [player name], I've had one of each lower tier clue scroll from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that noticeboard for?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: It lets you view any of your S.T.A.S.H units that you have built around Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh that seems really useful! It's a bit of a shame I need to come here everytime to check though.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Well it's just a board with some notes on it. I'm sure you could figure something out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose you're right, I don't suppose you have a spare one I could buy off you to save me the hassle?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: No, but I could write down the instructions to make one. Then all you'd need is a house with a study to build it in, and a bolt of cloth.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I'm not giving it away for free, 500 coins is just covering my expenses!

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: You don't have enough space for it.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Alright, feel free to carry on using mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about scroll boxes?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Well, the long and short of it is that scroll boxes contain clue scrolls, but in a much easier to carry form factor.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Now, just because they're easier to carry, it doesn't mean you can take as many as you want. You'll need scroll cases to be able to store them.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: You can get scroll cases by completing clues. You can get up to two extra scroll cases for each clue tier by doing that kind of clue.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: I can give you the exact numbers, but I wouldn't worry too much about them. You'll get them eventually.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: If you want to help deal with the strange casket I have upstairs, I think it also has some scroll cases as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how many scrolls can I carry right now?

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: You'll find that information written on the statistics board by the door.

sections.title: Using a clue scroll on Watson
Any tier from beginner to elite
Master clue with an active Sherlock step

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You said you didn't know Sherlock!

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Sure is windy today, did you hear that?

sections.title: Master clue with any other active step

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Sorry [player name]. That scroll is for you, not me.

sections.title: Using a master scroll book on Watson

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Do you want to trade that in? You'd need another copy to take your scrolls out again. But I'll swap it for some teleport scrolls if you like, so you can travel here more easily.

lines.speaker: Watson
lines.text: Come again if you change your mind.
